name: Inspector Nalinikanta
overview: A meticulous murder of Sharmila Sen occurs days after her 15th marriage anniversary with renowned prosthetic surgeon Aditya Sen. Inspector Nalini Kundu takes the lead in the investigation and starts unfolding the mysteries.

trailers.title: Inspector Nalinikanta | Official Trailer | Rajatava Datta | Rupsha | Subrata Dutta | KLiKK
